overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA: Vice City showing the protagonist Tommy Vercetti walking on Vice Point beach during a purple-hued dusk. The character walks toward the camera past a yellow lifeguard tower while a tall apartment building dominates the right side of the frame, with palm trees and distant city lights visible along the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban beach with high-rise hotel backdrop

agents.ego_description: character in green Hawaiian shirt walking toward the camera across the sandy beach

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking away from the camera

entered.detail: white high-rise residential building with grid-patterned windows
dense row of palm trees marking the beach tree line
city buildings with illuminated windows visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on Vice Point beach at dusk, with the protagonist walking toward the camera. A tall white apartment building dominates the right side while palm trees line the distant shore. A few pedestrians stroll in the background across the open sand.

events.description: yellow lifeguard tower enters view from the left as the tall building exits right

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward while passing the yellow lifeguard tower on the left

entered.detail: elevated wooden lifeguard station painted bright yellow with stairs

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a distinctive yellow lifeguard tower that enters from the left, while the apartment building moves out of view behind. The beach remains wide and open with scattered pedestrians walking in the distance under the purple dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach returning toward hotel district

events.description: camera rotates right to bring the tall apartment building back into view

agents.ego_description: walking toward the camera as the view pans to reveal the building again

entered.detail: white high-rise building returning to view on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the camera rotates right to frame the tall apartment building once again. The lifeguard tower falls behind and exits view, while the palm tree line shifts back toward the center of the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a purple-hued beach at dusk, shifting focus between a walking protagonist and the towering architecture of the shoreline. It begins with the character walking toward the camera on the open sand of Vice Point, with a tall white apartment building dominating the right side of the frame and palm trees lining the distant coast. As the character advances, the camera tracks past a distinctive yellow lifeguard tower entering from the left while the apartment building gradually slides out of view. The scene then shifts as the camera rotates to the right, causing the lifeguard tower to fall behind and exit the frame while bringing the tall apartment building back into focus. Finally, the perspective realigns to center the distant line of palm trees against the horizon as the protagonist continues his walk.
